prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-HACBPCMTS-8PC-TT Product Type: TOOLS Brand (from catalog): ToolTreaux Existing Title: ToolTreaux Basic Pottery Tools Modeling Clay Arts and Crafts Supplies Set - 8pc Description: The ToolTreaux ceramics and pottery tool set comes with 8 essential tools for clay molding and sculpting. Inside the set you'll find the following tools: a loop tool for removing clay, a ribbon tool for cutting and shaping, a needle tool for designing and placing, a potter's rib for shaping and smoothing, a modeling tool for contouring, a metal scraper for trimming, a sponge for wetting clay, and a clay cutter. All of these basic tools are great for crafting with clay whether you're a beginner or experienced potter.

All of the tools included in this kit are made of durable and high-quality materials including stainless steel that won't rust, polished hardwood and soft sponge. All of these potter's supplies are easy to clean with soap and water - just make sure to clean and dry them thoroughly before and after each use to ensure longevity.

We've also included a plastic carry pouch with a sturdy zip closure to secure your pottery tools when not in use. All of the sculpting tools fit neatly inside the pouch and the pouch itself is designed to fit inside most standard tool or craft boxes as well as storage containers and organizers to keep your workspace clean and tidy.

Although these tools were specifically designed for clay molding and sculpting, you can also use them for other crafting projects including working with polymers, 3D printing materials and paint. Make sure to have a set of reliable potter's tools before your next sculpting project. Search Terms: pottery tools trimming tools and supplies pottery clay clay tools polymer tools sculpting tools modeling clay craft organizers and storage supplies kits materials glue molding clay sculpting clay pottery wheel diy kits for adults arts and crafts Features: - ESSENTIAL POTTERY TOOLS - ToolTreaux pottery tool set comes with 8 basic and essential tools for clay molding - loop tool for removing clay, ribbon tool for cutting and shaping, needle tool for designing and placing, potter's rib for shaping and smoothing, modeling tool for contouring, metal scraper for trimming, sponge for wetting clay and clay cutter - HIGH-QUALITY CONSTRUCTION - All tools included are made of durable, high-quality materials like polished hardwood and stainless steel. Corrosion resistant steel won't rust and all supplies are easy to clean (make sure to clean and dry thoroughly after each use) - STORAGE POUCH INCLUDED - Pottery tool set comes with included plastic carry pouch with sturdy zip closure to secure tools when not in use. All tools fit neatly inside and tool pouch is designed to fit in most standard tool boxes and hobby craft storage containers and organizers - VERSATILE CRAFTING TOOLS - Although designed for clay molding and ceramics, pottery tools are great for other crafting projects like working with polymers, 3D printing and other sculpting materials. Use with both soft and hard art supply mediums - SPECIFICATIONS - 8 piece set; Colors: chrome, wood, yellow; Materials: sponge, stainless steel, polished hardwood, plastic; Carry pouch included with zip closure; Dimensions: 9" x 3.75" x 1.5" === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ToolTreaux 8-pc Pottery Tools Clay Modeling Sculpting Set

tokens.name: Pottery Tools Clay Modeling Sculpting Set

anthropic.title_differentiation: 8 Essential Tools, Stainless Steel And Hardwood, Includes Carry Pouch, Beginner To Advanced

openai.title_differentiation: 8 Piece Set, Loop Ribbon Needle And Scraper Tools, Hardwood And Stainless Steel, Carry Pouch Included, For Clay Sculpting
